subcodes.first_line: O Prisoner! We came to the abode of Him Who conversed with God. What did We speak? The mention of the All-Bountiful. What did We behold? The lights of the All-Merciful. What did We hear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مسجون آمدیم منزل کلیم چه گفتیم ذکر کریم چه دیدیم انوار رحیم چه شنیدیم
